        <span class="n">raw_match</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">re</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">match</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">r</span><span class="s2">&quot;&lt;/\s*[^&gt;]+&gt;&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">raw_text</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">end_start</span><span class="p">:])</span>
        <span class="n">raw</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">raw_match</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">group</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">raw_match</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;&lt;/</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">tag</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&gt;&quot;</span>
        <span class="n">end</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">end_start</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">raw</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">open_blocks</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">open_blocks</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="o">-</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">tag_name</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">tag</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">block</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">open_blocks</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">pop</span><span class="p">()</span>
            <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">blocks</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">_ParsedRawBlock</span><span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="n">tag_name</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">block</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">tag_name</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">path</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">block</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">path</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">outer_start</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">block</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">outer_start</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">outer_end</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">end</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">inner_start</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">block</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">inner_start</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">inner_end</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">end_start</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">i</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="nb">range</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">stack</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-</span> <span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="o">-</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="o">-</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">stack</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">i</span><span class="p">][</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">tag</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="k">del</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">stack</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">i</span><span class="p">:]</span>
                <span class="k">break</span>


<div class="viewcode-block" id="sha256_path">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.epub_manifest.sha256_path">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">sha256_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">path</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Path</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Return the SHA256 hex digest of ``path``.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">sha256</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">Path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">path</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">read_bytes</span><span class="p">())</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">hexdigest</span><span class="p">()</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="assert_source_sha">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.epub_manifest.assert_source_sha">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">assert_source_sha</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">path</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Path</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">expected_sha</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Raise if ``path`` does not match ``expected_sha``.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">actual_sha</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">sha256_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">path</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">expected_sha</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">actual_sha</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="n">expected_sha</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="ne">ValueError</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Source EPUB SHA256 mismatch: expected </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">expected_sha</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">, got </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">actual_sha</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">.&quot;</span>
        <span class="p">)</span></div>



<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">prose_span_from_epub_ref</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">span_ref</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">EpubSpanRef</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">ProseSpan</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Convert an EPUB span reference to a ProseSpan for sentence segmentation.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">typing</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">cast</span>

    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">ProseSpan</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">text</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">span_ref</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_text</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">placeholders</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">span_ref</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">placeholders</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">protected_terms</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">span_ref</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">protected_terms</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">source_markup</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">cast</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">Literal</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;plain:v1&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;epub-inline-xhtml:v1&quot;</span><span class="p">],</span> <span class="n">span_ref</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_markup</span>
        <span class="p">),</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>


<div class="viewcode-block" id="build_raw_block_index">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.epub_manifest.build_raw_block_index">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">build_raw_block_index</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">structured</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Any</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">_RawBlock</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Map epub2text block ids to raw archive offsets and fragments.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">blocks_by_document_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Any</span><span class="p">]]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{}</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">block</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">structured</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">blocks</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">blocks_by_document_id</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">setdefault</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">block</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">document_id</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[])</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">block</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">raw_index</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">_RawBlock</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{}</span>
    <span class="k">with</span> <span class="n">zipfile</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">ZipFile</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">structured</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_path</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="k">as</span> <span class="n">archive</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">archive_names</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">archive</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">namelist</span><span class="p">()</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">document</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">structured</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">documents</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">structured_blocks</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">blocks_by_document_id</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">document</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">document_id</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[])</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">structured_blocks</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="k">continue</span>

            <span class="n">href</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_resolve_archive_href</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">document</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">href</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">archive_names</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">raw_bytes</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">archive</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">read</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">href</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">encoding</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">document</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">encoding</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="s2">&quot;utf-8&quot;</span>
            <span class="n">raw_text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">raw_bytes</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">decode</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">encoding</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">block_tags</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">frozenset</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">block</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">tag_name</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">block</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">structured_blocks</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">raw_parser</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_RawBlockParser</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">raw_text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">block_tags</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">block_tags</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">raw_parser</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">feed</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">raw_text</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">raw_parser</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">close</span><span class="p">()</span>

            <span class="n">raw_blocks</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">raw_parser</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">blocks</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">raw_blocks</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">structured_blocks</span><span class="p">):</span>
                <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="ne">ValueError</span><span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Could not map EPUB document </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">href</span><span class="si">!r}</span><span class="s2">: parsed </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">raw_blocks</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> &quot;</span>
                    <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;raw text blocks but epub2text reported </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">structured_blocks</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">.&quot;</span>
                <span class="p">)</span>

            <span class="n">raw_digest</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">sha256</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">raw_bytes</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">hexdigest</span><span class="p">()</span>
            <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">block</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">raw_block</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="nb">zip</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">structured_blocks</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">raw_blocks</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">strict</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">):</span>
                <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="n">raw_block</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">tag_name</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="n">block</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">tag_name</span>
                    <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">raw_block</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">path</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="n">block</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">element_path</span>
                <span class="p">):</span>
                    <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="ne">ValueError</span><span class="p">(</span>
                        <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Could not map EPUB block </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">block</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> back to raw source XHTML.&quot;</span>
                    <span class="p">)</span>

                <span class="n">raw_index</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">block</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_RawBlock</span><span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="n">href</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">href</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">raw_sha256</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">raw_digest</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">tag_name</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">block</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">tag_name</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">text</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">_normalize_block_text</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">block</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">),</span>
                    <span class="n">outer_start</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">raw_block</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">outer_start</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">outer_end</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">raw_block</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">outer_end</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">inner_start</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">raw_block</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">inner_start</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">inner_end</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">raw_block</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">inner_end</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">source_fragment</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">raw_text</span><span class="p">[</span>
                        <span class="n">raw_block</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">inner_start</span> <span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">raw_block</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">inner_end</span>
                    <span class="p">],</span>
                <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">raw_index</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="structured_to_text2epub_manifest">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.epub_manifest.structured_to_text2epub_manifest">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">structured_to_text2epub_manifest</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">structured</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Any</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">raw_block_index</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">_RawBlock</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">object</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Convert an epub2text structured extraction to a text2epub manifest.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">raw_block_index</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">raw_block_index</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">build_raw_block_index</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">structured</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">blocks_by_document_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">object</span><span class="p">]]]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{</span>
        <span class="n">document</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">document_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="p">[]</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">document</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">structured</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">documents</span>
    <span class="p">}</span>
    <span class="n">document_hrefs</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{}</span>
    <span class="n">document_raw_sha256</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{}</span>

    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">block</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">structured</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">blocks</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">raw_block</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">raw_block_index</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">block</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span><span class="p">]</span>
        <span class="n">document_hrefs</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">block</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">document_id</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">raw_block</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">href</span>
        <span class="n">document_raw_sha256</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">block</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">document_id</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">raw_block</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">raw_sha256</span>
        <span class="n">blocks_by_document_id</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">setdefault</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">block</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">document_id</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[])</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="p">{</span>
                <span class="s2">&quot;block_id&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">block</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="s2">&quot;text&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">block</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="s2">&quot;source_start&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">raw_block</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">outer_start</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="s2">&quot;source_end&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">raw_block</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">outer_end</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="s2">&quot;body_source_start&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">raw_block</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">inner_start</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="s2">&quot;body_source_end&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">raw_block</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">inner_end</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="s2">&quot;source_fragment&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">raw_block</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_fragment</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="s2">&quot;replacement_mode&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="s2">&quot;whole_block_body&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="p">}</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">entries</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">object</span><span class="p">]]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">document</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">structured</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">documents</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">entries</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="p">{</span>
                <span class="s2">&quot;href&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">document_hrefs</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">document</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">document_id</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">document</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">href</span><span class="p">),</span>
                <span class="s2">&quot;media_type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">document</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">media_type</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="s2">&quot;spine_index&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">document</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">spine_index</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="s2">&quot;raw_sha256&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">document_raw_sha256</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="n">document</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">document_id</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">document</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">raw_bytes_sha256</span>
                <span class="p">),</span>
                <span class="s2">&quot;blocks&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">blocks_by_document_id</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">document</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">document_id</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[]),</span>
            <span class="p">}</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="p">{</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;schema_version&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;source_sha256&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">structured</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_sha256</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;entries&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">entries</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">}</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="structured_to_span_refs">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.epub_manifest.structured_to_span_refs">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">structured_to_span_refs</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">structured</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Any</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">protected_terms</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">],</span>
    <span class="n">raw_block_index</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">_RawBlock</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">tuple</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">ProseSpan</span><span class="p">],</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">EpubSpanRef</span><span class="p">]]:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Build booktx spans plus ordered span refs from epub2text blocks.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">raw_block_index</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">raw_block_index</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">build_raw_block_index</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">structured</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.epub_inline_xhtml</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">INLINE_XHTML_CODEC</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">inline_skeleton</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">protect_names_in_xhtml_text_nodes</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="c1"># epub2text stores sentence-level segments globally on the structured</span>
    <span class="c1"># extraction, keyed by block id. TextBlock has no ``segments`` attribute, so</span>
    <span class="c1"># looking it up on the block always missed and booktx fell back to the full</span>
    <span class="c1"># block XHTML fragment. Consume the upstream segments here so sentence</span>
    <span class="c1"># detection already happened on visible block text.</span>
    <span class="n">segments_by_block_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Any</span><span class="p">]]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{}</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">segment</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="nb">getattr</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">structured</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;segments&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[])</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="p">[]:</span>
        <span class="n">segments_by_block_id</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">setdefault</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">segment</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">block_id</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[])</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">segment</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">items</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">segments_by_block_id</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">values</span><span class="p">():</span>
        <span class="n">items</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">sort</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">key</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="k">lambda</span> <span class="n">segment</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">segment</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">block_text_start</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">segment</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">block_text_end</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">spans</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">ProseSpan</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="n">span_refs</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">EpubSpanRef</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>

    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">block</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">structured</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">blocks</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">block</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">block</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">():</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>

        <span class="n">block_fragment</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="nb">getattr</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nb">getattr</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">block</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;xhtml_fragment&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">),</span> <span class="s2">&quot;xhtml&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">block</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">source_view_sha256</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">sha256</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">block_fragment</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">encode</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;utf-8&quot;</span><span class="p">))</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">hexdigest</span><span class="p">()</span>
        <span class="n">segment_items</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">segments_by_block_id</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">block</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="p">[</span><span class="n">block</span><span class="p">]</span>
        <span class="n">block_has_upstream_segments</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">block</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">segments_by_block_id</span>
        <span class="n">first_span_index</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">spans</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">raw_block</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">raw_block_index</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">block</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span><span class="p">]</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">segment</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">segment_items</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">segment_text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">getattr</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">segment</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;text&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">block</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">segment_fragment</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="nb">getattr</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nb">getattr</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">segment</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;xhtml_fragment&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">),</span> <span class="s2">&quot;xhtml&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">segment_text</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">segment_text</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">segment_text</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">():</span>
                <span class="k">continue</span>
            <span class="n">protected_text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">record_placeholders</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">protect_names_in_xhtml_text_nodes</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">segment_fragment</span><span class="p">),</span> <span class="n">protected_terms</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">names</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[</span><span class="n">placeholder</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">original</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">placeholder</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">record_placeholders</span><span class="p">]</span>
            <span class="n">spans</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">ProseSpan</span><span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="n">text</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">protected_text</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">placeholders</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">record_placeholders</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">protected_terms</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">names</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">presegmented</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">block_has_upstream_segments</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">source_markup</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">INLINE_XHTML_CODEC</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">span_ref</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">EpubSpanRef</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">span_index</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">first_span_index</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">block_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">block</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">document_href</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">block</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">document_href</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">spine_index</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">block</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">spine_index</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">tag_name</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">block</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">tag_name</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">source_text</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">block</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">source_text_sha256</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">sha256</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">block</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">encode</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;utf-8&quot;</span><span class="p">))</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">hexdigest</span><span class="p">(),</span>
            <span class="n">source_char_start</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">raw_block</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">inner_start</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">source_char_end</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">raw_block</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">inner_end</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">placeholders</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="p">[],</span>
            <span class="n">protected_terms</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="p">[],</span>
            <span class="n">source_view_text</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">block_fragment</span><span class="p">),</span>
            <span class="n">source_view_sha256</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">source_view_sha256</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">source_markup</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">INLINE_XHTML_CODEC</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">inline_skeleton</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="p">[</span>
                <span class="n">asdict</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">token</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">token</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">inline_skeleton</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">block_fragment</span><span class="p">))</span>
            <span class="p">],</span>
            <span class="n">chapter_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">block</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">chapter_title</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">block</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_title</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">span_refs</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">span_ref</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">spans</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">span_refs</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="structured_to_navigation_refs">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.epub_manifest.structured_to_navigation_refs">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">structured_to_navigation_refs</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">structured</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Any</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">EpubNavigationRef</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Convert epub2text navigation entries into stored manifest refs.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">refs</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">EpubNavigationRef</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">entry</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">structured</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">navigation</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">refs</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">EpubNavigationRef</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="nb">id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">entry</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">title</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">entry</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">title</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">href</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">entry</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">href</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">document_href</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">entry</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">document_href</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">fragment</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">entry</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">fragment</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">spine_index</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">entry</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">spine_index</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">source_char_start</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">entry</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_char_start</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">source_byte_start</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">entry</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_byte_start</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">level</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">entry</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">level</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">parent_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">entry</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">parent_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">order</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">entry</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">order</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">children</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">entry</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">children</span><span class="p">),</span>
                <span class="n">source</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">entry</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">refs</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="load_epub_template_from_manifest">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.epub_manifest.load_epub_template_from_manifest">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">load_epub_template_from_manifest</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">manifest</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Manifest</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">EpubTemplateData</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Validate and return the EPUB v2 template stored in ``manifest``.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">manifest</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">format</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;epub&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="ne">ValueError</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;Manifest source format is not EPUB.&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">manifest</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">version</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="mi">2</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="ne">ValueError</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">LEGACY_EPUB_MANIFEST_MESSAGE</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="k">try</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">template</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">EpubTemplateData</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">model_validate</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">manifest</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">template</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">except</span> <span class="ne">Exception</span> <span class="k">as</span> <span class="n">exc</span><span class="p">:</span>  <span class="c1"># noqa: BLE001</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="ne">ValueError</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;EPUB manifest template is invalid: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">exc</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">exc</span>

    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">template</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">pipeline</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="n">EPUB_TEMPLATE_PIPELINE</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="ne">ValueError</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">LEGACY_EPUB_MANIFEST_MESSAGE</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">template</span></div>



<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_resolve_archive_href</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">href</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">archive_names</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">])</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">href</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">archive_names</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">href</span>
    <span class="n">suffix_matches</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[</span><span class="n">name</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">name</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">archive_names</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">name</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">endswith</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;/</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">href</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)]</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">suffix_matches</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">suffix_matches</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">]</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">href</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_normalize_block_text</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="n">collapsed</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot; &quot;</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">join</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">split</span><span class="p">())</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">_SPACE_BEFORE_PUNCT_RE</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">sub</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">r</span><span class="s2">&quot;\1&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">collapsed</span><span class="p">)</span>
</pre></div>
